top.title: Iran and Israel say they have halted strikes after first exchange of fire since truce
top.summary: Iran launched about 30 missiles at Israel following a strike in Lebanon, while Israel carried out two waves of air strikes in Iran.

top.title: Iran's strike on Israel suggests the regime's sense of resilience is growing
top.summary: Iran's decision to risk jeopardising peace talks may reflect how its leaders view their current position, writes BBC Persian editor Amir Azimi.

top.title: At least 35 dead after major earthquake strikes southern Philippines
top.summary: The magnitude-7.8 quake triggered small tsunami waves in the Philippines, Indonesia and Japan.

top.title: Jailed crypto founder Sam Bankman-Fried seeks Trump pardon
top.summary: The former leader of crypto platform FTX, currently serving a 25-year sentence, on Monday officially applied to be pardoned.

top.title: Starmer tells Apple and Google to ban nude images on children's phones
top.summary: Firms will be expected to activate built-in features to stop children accessing sexually explicit images.

top.title: The gamers taking on the industry to stop it switching off games
top.summary: Stop Killing Games is challenging the idea publishers can shut down a game without making sure it's still playable.

title.#text: WWDC 2026 bonus live blog: Tech Talk with Craig Federighi
Cameras get an Apple Intelligence boost in Apple Home
